air:FareRule.air:FareRuleLong: APPLICATION AND OTHER CONDITIONS RULE - 033/AEBT UNLESS OTHERWISE SPECIFIED GULF AIR BRANDED FARES APPLICATION CLASS OF SERVICE THESE FARES APPLY FOR BUSINESS/ECONOMY CLASS SERVICE. TYPES OF TRANSPORTATION THIS RULE GOVERNS ONE-WAY AND ROUND-TRIP FARES. FARES GOVERNED BY THIS RULE CAN BE USED TO CREATE ONE-WAY/ROUND-TRIP/OPEN-JAW/SINGLE OPEN-JAW/DOUBLE OPEN-JAW JOURNEYS. CAPACITY LIMITATIONS THE CARRIER SHALL LIMIT THE NUMBER OF PASSENGERS CARRIED ON ANY ONE FLIGHT AT FARES GOVERNED BY THIS RULE AND SUCH FARES WILL NOT NECESSARILY BE AVAILABLE ON ALL FLIGHTS. THE NUMBER OF SEATS WHICH THE CARRIER SHALL MAKE AVAILABLE ON A GIVEN FLIGHT WILL BE DETERMINED BY THE CARRIERS BEST JUDGMENT OTHER CONDITIONS GF RESERVES THE RIGHT TO CANCEL ANY PNR WHERE ITINERARY DO NOT COMPLY WITH THE RESERVATION BOOKING CODE / RBD/ --- IF A TICKET IS USED OUT OF SEQUENCE GF RESERVES THE RIGHT TO CANCEL ANY PNR OR INVALIDATE THE REMAINING FLIGHT COUPONS. IF A PASSENGER FAILS TO TRAVEL ON A SECTOR BOOKED GF RESERVES THE RIGHT TO CANCEL THE REMAINING GF SECTOR. --- ALL FARES ARE SUBJECT TO CHANGE OR WITHDRAWAL WITHOUT NOTICE. FARES ARE ONLY GUARANTEED IF AUTOPRICED AND TICKETED IN GDS ON THE SAME DAY. ---
FLIGHT APPLICATION FOR W- TYPE FARES THE FARE COMPONENT MUST BE ON ONE OR MORE OF THE FOLLOWING ANY GF FLIGHT OPERATED BY GF.

ADVANCE RES/TICKETING UNLESS OTHERWISE SPECIFIED RESERVATIONS ARE REQUIRED FOR ALL SECTORS. NOTE - GF RESERVES THE RIGHT TO CANCEL ANY PNR WHERE ITINERARIES DO NOT COMPLY WITH RESERVATION BOOKING CODE /RBD/. -------------------------------------------- IF A TICKET IS USED OUT OF SEQUENCE GF RESERVES THE RIGHT TO CANCEL ANY PNR OR INVALIDATE THE REMAINING FLIGHT COUPONS. ---------------------------------------------- IF A PASSENGER FAILS TO TRAVEL ON A SECTOR BOOKED GF RESERVES THE RIGHT TO CANCEL REMAINING GF SECTORS. -------------------------------------------------- GALILEO - GC ASTERISK/DISPLAY GF/21 AMADEUS - GGAIRGF/413 ABACUS - Y/VEN/GFA/P26 WORLDSPAN - G/AIR/GF0/P3/L2 SABRE - REFER TO DRS PGES TICKETING TIME
MINIMUM STAY NONE FOR ONE WAY FARES
MAXIMUM STAY NONE FOR ONE WAY FARES
STOPOVERS UNLESS OTHERWISE SPECIFIED 1 FREE STOPOVER PERMITTED ON THE PRICING UNIT INBOUND. A STOPOVER MAY NOT EXCEED 7 DAYS.
TRANSFERS UNLESS OTHERWISE SPECIFIED UNLIMITED TRANSFERS PERMITTED ON THE PRICING UNIT FARE BREAK SURFACE SECTORS PERMITTED AND EMBEDDED SURFACE SECTORS NOT PERMITTED ON THE FARE COMPONENT.

PERMITTED COMBINATIONS FOR ONE WAY FARES SINGLE/DOUBLE OPEN JAWS/ROUND TRIPS/CIRCLE TRIPS NOT PERMITTED. APPLICABLE ADD-ON CONSTRUCTION IS ADDRESSED IN MISCELLANEOUS PROVISIONS - CATEGORY 23. END-ON-END END-ON-END COMBINATIONS NOT PERMITTED. VALIDATE ALL FARE COMPONENTS. SIDE TRIPS NOT PERMITTED. PROVIDED - COMBINATIONS ARE FOR CARRIER GF

SURCHARGES BETWEEN DXB AND PAKISTAN OUTBOUND - IF INFANT UNDER 02 WITHOUT A SEAT. THERE IS NO CHARGE FOR TRAVEL. THE PROVISIONS BELOW APPLY ONLY AS FOLLOWS - TICKETS MAY ONLY BE SOLD IN INDIA/PAKISTAN. ORIGINATING DXB OUTBOUND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 18.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR TRAVEL ON FRI. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 10.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR TRAVEL. AND - ORIGINATING DXB INBOUND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 18.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR TRAVEL ON SUN. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 10.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR TRAVEL. OUTBOUND - IF INFANT UNDER 02 WITHOUT A SEAT. THERE IS NO CHARGE FOR TRAVEL. ORIGINATING DXB OUTBOUND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 18.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR TRAVEL ON FRI. AND - ORIGINATING DXB INBOUND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 18.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR TRAVEL ON SUN. AND - ORIGINATING DXB OUTBOUND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 20.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FROM 19MAR 26 THROUGH 23MAR 26. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 20.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FROM 21MAY 26 THROUGH 27MAY 26. AND - ORIGINATING DXB INBOUND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 20.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FROM 24MAR 26 THROUGH 28MAR 26. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 20.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FROM 29MAY 26 THROUGH 01JUN 26. UNLESS OTHERWISE SPECIFIED IF INFANT UNDER 02 WITHOUT A SEAT. AND - TICKETS MAY ONLY BE SOLD IN BANGLADESH/IRAQ. A SURCHARGE OF 12 PERCENT OF THE FARE PER TICKET WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR TRAVEL. AND - THERE IS NO CHARGE FOR TRAVEL. THE PROVISIONS BELOW APPLY ONLY AS FOLLOWS - TICKETS MAY ONLY BE SOLD IN BANGLADESH/IRAQ. A SURCHARGE OF 12 PERCENT OF THE FARE PER TICKET WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR TRAVEL. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 225.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN CAI AND BAH. PROVIDED TRAVEL IS ON ONE OR MORE OF THE FOLLOWING ANY GF FLIGHT OPERATED BY MS. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 115.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN BAK AND BAH. PROVIDED TRAVEL IS ON ONE OR MORE OF THE FOLLOWING ANY GF FLIGHT OPERATED BY J2. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 145.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN IST AND BAH. PROVIDED TRAVEL IS ON ONE OR MORE OF THE FOLLOWING ANY GF FLIGHT OPERATED BY TK. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 155.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN JED AND BAH. PROVIDED TRAVEL IS ON ONE OR MORE OF THE FOLLOWING ANY GF FLIGHT OPERATED BY SV. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 185.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN RUH AND BAH. PROVIDED TRAVEL IS ON ONE OR MORE OF THE FOLLOWING ANY GF FLIGHT OPERATED BY SV. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 140.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN JED/MED AND BAH. PROVIDED TRAVEL IS ON ONE OR MORE OF THE FOLLOWING ANY GF FLIGHT OPERATED BY XY. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 85.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN MCT AND BAH. PROVIDED TRAVEL IS ON ONE OR MORE OF THE FOLLOWING ANY GF FLIGHT OPERATED BY WY. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 130.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN RUH AND BAH. PROVIDED TRAVEL IS ON ONE OR MORE OF THE FOLLOWING ANY GF FLIGHT OPERATED BY XY. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 23.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR TRAVEL IN BUS EQUIPMENT FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM DMS/DMM AND ARRIVAL IN BAH. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 11.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR TRAVEL IN BUS EQUIPMENT FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM BAH AND ARRIVAL IN DMS/DMM. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 33.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM LON AND ARRIVAL IN BAH FROM 08APR 26 THROUGH 09APR 26. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 33.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM BAH AND ARRIVAL IN LON FROM 13APR 26 THROUGH 14APR 26. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 25.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM CAN/SHA AND ARRIVAL IN BAH FROM 29JAN 26 THROUGH 23FEB 26. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 25.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM BAH AND ARRIVAL IN CAN/SHA FROM 23FEB 26 THROUGH 28FEB 26. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 30.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM LHR AIRPORT AND ARRIVAL IN BAH FROM 26MAR 26 THROUGH 28MAR 26. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 25.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM BKK AND ARRIVAL IN BAH FROM 06AUG 26 THROUGH 31AUG 26. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 25.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM SIN AND ARRIVAL IN BAH FROM 06AUG 26 THROUGH 31AUG 26. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 25.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM BAH AND ARRIVAL IN BKK FROM 25JUN 26 THROUGH 09AUG 26. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 25.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM BAH AIRPORT AND ARRIVAL IN SIN FROM 26JUN 26 THROUGH 09AUG 26. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 40.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM UNITED KINGDOM AND ARRIVAL IN BAH FROM 17DEC 26 THROUGH 20DEC 26. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 35.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM BAH AND ARRIVAL IN UNITED KINGDOM FROM 02JAN 27 THROUGH 04JAN 27. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 35.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM GERMANY AND ARRIVAL IN BAH FROM 18DEC 26 THROUGH 22DEC 26. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 35.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM BAH AND ARRIVAL IN GERMANY FROM 01JAN 27 THROUGH 06JAN 27. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 25.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM FRANCE AND ARRIVAL IN BAH FROM 19DEC 26 THROUGH 21DEC 26. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 25.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM BAH AND ARRIVAL IN FRANCE FROM 01JAN 27 THROUGH 04JAN 27. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 25.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM GREECE AND ARRIVAL IN BAH FROM 19DEC 26 THROUGH 20DEC 26. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 25.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM BAH AND ARRIVAL IN GREECE FROM 04JAN 27 THROUGH 05JAN 27. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 25.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM ITALY AND ARRIVAL IN BAH FROM 25DEC 26 THROUGH 27DEC 26. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 25.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM BAH AND ARRIVAL IN ITALY FROM 02JAN 27 THROUGH 04JAN 27. IF INFANT UNDER 02 WITHOUT A SEAT. THERE IS NO CHARGE FOR TRAVEL. A SURCHARGE OF USD 225.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN CAI AND BAH. PROVIDED TRAVEL IS ON ONE OR MORE OF THE FOLLOWING ANY GF FLIGHT OPERATED BY MS. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 115.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN BAK AND BAH. PROVIDED TRAVEL IS ON ONE OR MORE OF THE FOLLOWING ANY GF FLIGHT OPERATED BY J2. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 145.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN IST AND BAH. PROVIDED TRAVEL IS ON ONE OR MORE OF THE FOLLOWING ANY GF FLIGHT OPERATED BY TK. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 155.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN JED AND BAH. PROVIDED TRAVEL IS ON ONE OR MORE OF THE FOLLOWING ANY GF FLIGHT OPERATED BY SV. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 185.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN RUH AND BAH. PROVIDED TRAVEL IS ON ONE OR MORE OF THE FOLLOWING ANY GF FLIGHT OPERATED BY SV. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 140.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN JED/MED AND BAH. PROVIDED TRAVEL IS ON ONE OR MORE OF THE FOLLOWING ANY GF FLIGHT OPERATED BY XY. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 85.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN MCT AND BAH. PROVIDED TRAVEL IS ON ONE OR MORE OF THE FOLLOWING ANY GF FLIGHT OPERATED BY WY. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 130.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN RUH AND BAH. PROVIDED TRAVEL IS ON ONE OR MORE OF THE FOLLOWING ANY GF FLIGHT OPERATED BY XY. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 23.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR TRAVEL IN BUS EQUIPMENT FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM DMS/DMM AND ARRIVAL IN BAH. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 11.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR TRAVEL IN BUS EQUIPMENT FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM BAH AND ARRIVAL IN DMS/DMM. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 33.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM LON AND ARRIVAL IN BAH FROM 08APR 26 THROUGH 09APR 26. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 33.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM BAH AND ARRIVAL IN LON FROM 13APR 26 THROUGH 14APR 26. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 25.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM CAN/SHA AND ARRIVAL IN BAH FROM 29JAN 26 THROUGH 23FEB 26. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 25.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM BAH AND ARRIVAL IN CAN/SHA FROM 23FEB 26 THROUGH 28FEB 26. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 30.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM LHR AIRPORT AND ARRIVAL IN BAH FROM 26MAR 26 THROUGH 28MAR 26. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 25.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM BKK AND ARRIVAL IN BAH FROM 06AUG 26 THROUGH 31AUG 26. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 25.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM SIN AND ARRIVAL IN BAH FROM 06AUG 26 THROUGH 31AUG 26. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 25.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM BAH AND ARRIVAL IN BKK FROM 25JUN 26 THROUGH 09AUG 26. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 25.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM BAH AIRPORT AND ARRIVAL IN SIN FROM 26JUN 26 THROUGH 09AUG 26. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 40.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM UNITED KINGDOM AND ARRIVAL IN BAH FROM 17DEC 26 THROUGH 20DEC 26. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 35.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM BAH AND ARRIVAL IN UNITED KINGDOM FROM 02JAN 27 THROUGH 04JAN 27. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 35.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM GERMANY AND ARRIVAL IN BAH FROM 18DEC 26 THROUGH 22DEC 26. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 35.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM BAH AND ARRIVAL IN GERMANY FROM 01JAN 27 THROUGH 06JAN 27. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 25.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM FRANCE AND ARRIVAL IN BAH FROM 19DEC 26 THROUGH 21DEC 26. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 25.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM BAH AND ARRIVAL IN FRANCE FROM 01JAN 27 THROUGH 04JAN 27. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 25.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM GREECE AND ARRIVAL IN BAH FROM 19DEC 26 THROUGH 20DEC 26. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 25.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM BAH AND ARRIVAL IN GREECE FROM 04JAN 27 THROUGH 05JAN 27. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 25.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM ITALY AND ARRIVAL IN BAH FROM 25DEC 26 THROUGH 27DEC 26. AND - A SURCHARGE OF USD 25.00 WILL BE ADDED TO THE APPLICABLE FARE FOR PEAK TRAVEL FOR ANY SECTOR BETWEEN DEPARTURE FROM BAH AND ARRIVAL IN ITALY FROM 02JAN 27 THROUGH 04JAN 27.
TRAVEL RESTRICTIONS UNLESS OTHERWISE SPECIFIED VALID FOR TRAVEL COMMENCING ON/BEFORE 30NOV 26.

SALES RESTRICTIONS UNLESS OTHERWISE SPECIFIED TICKETS MUST BE ISSUED ON/BEFORE 30JUN 26. UNLESS OTHERWISE SPECIFIED TICKETS MAY NOT BE SOLD IN SUDAN/LEBANON. UNLESS OTHERWISE SPECIFIED IF THE FARE COMPONENT IS ON ONE OR MORE OF THE FOLLOWING ANY GF FLIGHT OPERATED BY GF TICKETS MUST BE ISSUED ON GF AND MAY NOT BE SOLD IN SUDAN/LEBANON/EGYPT OR - TICKETS MUST BE ISSUED ON GF OR HR AND MAY NOT BE SOLD IN SUDAN/LEBANON/BAHRAIN/EGYPT OR - TICKETS MUST BE ISSUED ON GF OR GP AND MAY NOT BE SOLD IN SUDAN/LEBANON/BAHRAIN/EGYPT OR - TICKETS MUST BE ISSUED ON GF OR W2 AND MAY NOT BE SOLD IN SUDAN/LEBANON/BAHRAIN/EGYPT OTHERWISE TICKETS MUST BE ISSUED ON GF AND MAY NOT BE SOLD IN SUDAN/LEBANON/EGYPT

PENALTIES FROM/TO SOUTH ASIAN SUBCONTINENT NOTE - RULE 0100 IN IPRG100 ALSO APPLIES CHANGES ANY TIME CHARGE USD 55.00 FOR REISSUE. NOTE - CHANGE FEES MUST BE CODED AS OA IN THE TAX FIELD. CHARGE USD 110.00 FOR NO-SHOW. NOTE - PASSENGER WILL BE TREATED AS NO SHOW IF THE BOOKING IS NOT CANCELLED AT LEAST 4 HOURS BEFORE THE DEPARTURE OF THE FLIGHT. ------------------------------------------------- IN CASE OF NO SHOW ONLY NO SHOW CHARGES APPLY NO SHOW FEES MUST BE CODED AS OB IN THE TAX FIELD. -------------------------------------------------- THE ABOVE CHARGE APPLIES TO ADULT AND CHILDREN THIS CHARGE DOES NOT APPLY TO INFANTS NOT OCCUPYING A SEAT. -------------------------------------------------- USING COUPONS OUT OF SEQUENCE IS NOT PERMITTED NEW TKT HAS EQUAL OR HIGHER VALUE THAN PREVIOUS TKT REBOOKING IS REQUIRED IF RESERVATION CANCELLED -------------------------------------------------- CANCELLATIONS ANY TIME CHARGE USD 95.00 FOR CANCEL/REFUND. CHARGE USD 190.00 FOR NO-SHOW. NOTE - PASSENGER WILL BE TREATED AS NO SHOW IF THE BOOKING IS NOT CANCELLED AT LEAST 4 HOURS BEFORE THE DEPARTURE OF THE FLIGHT. -------------------------------------------------- IN CASE OF NO SHOW ONLY NO SHOW CHARGES APPLY -------------------------------------------------- AN ADDITIONAL ADMINISTRATIVE REFUND CHARGE OF USD30 OR EQUIVALENT IN OTHER CURRENCIES IS APPLICABLE TO ALL REFUNDS PROCESSED BY GULF AIR THAT SHOULD HAVE BEEN PROCESSED BY THE ISSUING AGENT. -------------------------------------------------- SERVICE CHARGES COLLECTED UNDER CODES DU/DV/OC/OA/OB/OD/OE ARE NON-REFUNDABLE. -------------------------------------------------- FOR PARTLY UTILIZED TICKETS DEDUCT THE APPLICABLE ONE WAY FARE IN SAME RBD OR HIGHER IF NO OW FARE IN SAME RBD PLUS THE REFUND CHARGE. ------------------------------------------------- THE ABOVE CHARGE APPLIES TO ADULT AND CHILDREN THIS CHARGE DOES NOT APPLY TO INFANTS NOT OCCUPYING A SEAT. -------------------------------------------------- NO REFUND IF COUPONS USED OUT SEQUENCE. UNLESS OTHERWISE SPECIFIED FOR TICKETING ON/AFTER 26MAR 26 IF TRAVEL COMMENCES ON/BEFORE 31MAR 27 FOR TRAVEL ON/BEFORE 31MAR 27 CHANGES CHANGES PERMITTED. NOTE - FIRST CHANGE PERMITTED FOC UPTO FOUR HOURS BEFORE FLIGHT DEPARTURE AND SUBSEQUENT CHANGE AT CHARGE. FARE SURCHARGES AND TAXES DIFFERENCE WILL APPLY -------------------------------------------------- CHANGE AND NO SHOW FEES DO NOT APPLY FOR UPGRADE OF ALL FARE COMPONENTS TO A HIGHER CABIN ON SAME FLIGHT NUMBER AND DATE. ONLY DIFFERENCE IN FARE AND TAXES WILL BE COLLECTED. THIS DOES NOT APPLY FOR PARTIALLY USED OR PARTIALLY UPGRADED TICKETS AS THE HIGHIEST CHARGE OF THE FARE COMPONENTS WILL BE COLLECTED.

HIP/MILEAGE EXCEPTIONS UNLESS OTHERWISE SPECIFIED THE HIGHER INTERMEDIATE POINT RULE DOES NOT APPLY FOR STOPOVERS. AND - THE HIGHER INTERMEDIATE POINT RULE DOES NOT APPLY FOR CONNECTIONS. NOTE - THESE FARES SHOULD NOT BE COMPARED CHECKED WITH HIP DMC CTM AND COP
TICKET ENDORSEMENT UNLESS OTHERWISE SPECIFIED THE ORIGINAL AND THE REISSUED TICKET MUST BE ANNOTATED - VALID ON GF ONLY/NON ENDO - IN THE ENDORSEMENT BOX.

CHILDREN DISCOUNTS UNLESS OTHERWISE SPECIFIED ACCOMPANIED CHILD 2-11 - CHARGE 80 PERCENT OF THE FARE. TICKETING CODE - BASE FARE CODE PLUS CH. MUST BE ACCOMPANIED ON ALL FLIGHTS IN SAME COMPARTMENT BY ADULT OR - 1ST INFANT UNDER 2 WITHOUT A SEAT - CHARGE 10 PERCENT OF THE FARE. TICKETING CODE - BASE FARE CODE PLUS IN. MUST BE ACCOMPANIED ON ALL FLIGHTS IN SAME COMPARTMENT BY ADULT OR - 2ND INFANT UNDER 2 WITH A SEAT - CHARGE 80 PERCENT OF THE FARE. TICKETING CODE - BASE FARE CODE PLUS CH. MUST BE ACCOMPANIED ON ALL FLIGHTS IN SAME COMPARTMENT BY ADULT. NOTE - THE INFANT MUST BE BETWEEN 6 AND 23 MONTHS AND A CAR SEAT MUST BE PROVIDED BY PASSENGER. THE CAR SEAT MUST BE OF A TYPE APPROVED FOR ON-BOARD USE. OR - UNACCOMPANIED CHILD 5-11 - CHARGE 100 PERCENT OF THE FARE.

MISCELLANEOUS PROVISIONS UNLESS OTHERWISE SPECIFIED THIS FARE MUST NOT BE USED AS THE HIGH OR THE LOW FARE WHEN CALCULATING A DIFFERENTIAL. THIS FARE MUST NOT BE USED AS THE THROUGH FARE WHEN PRICING A FARE COMPONENT WITH A DIFFERENTIAL.
VOLUNTARY CHANGES DO A CATEGORY 31 SPECIFIC TEXT ENTRY TO VIEW CONTENTS ALSO REFERENCE 16 PENALTIES - FOR ADDITIONAL CHANGE INFORMATION

VOLUNTARY REFUNDS FROM/TO SOUTH ASIAN SUBCONTINENT REFUND MUST BE REQUESTED BEFORE DEPARTURE OF JOURNEY. REFUND REQUEST REQUIRED 4 HOURS BEFORE ORIGINALLY SCHEDULED FLIGHT OF FIRST UNUSED TICKET COUPON. CHARGE USD 95.00 PER PRICING UNIT. IF ALL PENALTIES ARE HIGHEST IN PRICING UNIT COLLECT THE HIGHEST IN EACH PRICING UNIT. IF THERE IS A MIX OF PENALTY APPLICATIONS, THE MOST RESTRICTIVE APPLIES TO THE ENTIRE JOURNEY. NO CHARGE FOR INFANT WITHOUT SEAT. FORM OF REFUND - ORIGINAL FORM OF PAYMENT. ONLY VALIDATING CARRIER MAY REFUND TICKET. REPRICE USING EQUAL OR HIGHER RBD. OR - REFUND MUST BE REQUESTED BEFORE DEPARTURE OF JOURNEY. CHARGE USD 190.00 PER PRICING UNIT. IF ALL PENALTIES ARE HIGHEST IN PRICING UNIT COLLECT THE HIGHEST IN EACH PRICING UNIT. IF THERE IS A MIX OF PENALTY APPLICATIONS, THE MOST RESTRICTIVE APPLIES TO THE ENTIRE JOURNEY. NO CHARGE FOR INFANT WITHOUT SEAT. FORM OF REFUND - ORIGINAL FORM OF PAYMENT. ONLY VALIDATING CARRIER MAY REFUND TICKET. REPRICE USING EQUAL OR HIGHER RBD. OR - REFUND MUST BE REQUESTED AFTER DEPARTURE OF JOURNEY. REFUND REQUEST REQUIRED 4 HOURS BEFORE ORIGINALLY SCHEDULED FLIGHT OF FIRST UNUSED TICKET COUPON. CHARGE USD 95.00 PER PRICING UNIT. IF ALL PENALTIES ARE HIGHEST IN PRICING UNIT COLLECT THE HIGHEST IN EACH PRICING UNIT. IF THERE IS A MIX OF PENALTY APPLICATIONS, THE MOST RESTRICTIVE APPLIES TO THE ENTIRE JOURNEY. NO CHARGE FOR INFANT WITHOUT SEAT. FORM OF REFUND - ORIGINAL FORM OF PAYMENT. ONLY VALIDATING CARRIER MAY REFUND TICKET. REPRICE FLOWN PORTION USING FARES IN EFFECT ON TICKET ISSUANCE DATE. FOR FULLY FLOWN FARE COMPONENTS FARE BREAK POINTS MAY NOT BE CHANGED. FOR PARTIALLY FLOWN FARE COMPONENTS ONLY DESTINATION FARE BREAK POINTS MAY BE CHANGED. REPRICE USING NORMAL/SPECIAL ONE WAY/ROUND TRIP FARES/ANY RULE/FARE CLASS/EQUAL OR HIGHER RBD. PUBLIC FARES ARE USED IF TICKETED FARE IS IN PUBLIC TARIFF. QUALIFIED PRIVATE FARES OR PUBLIC FARES ARE USED IF TICKETED FARE IS IN PRIVATE TARIFF. NEW FARE FOR FULLY FLOWN FARE COMPONENTS MUST BE EQUAL TO OR HIGHER THAN TICKETED FARE. OR - REFUND MUST BE REQUESTED AFTER DEPARTURE OF JOURNEY. CHARGE USD 190.00 PER PRICING UNIT. IF ALL PENALTIES ARE HIGHEST IN PRICING UNIT COLLECT THE HIGHEST IN EACH PRICING UNIT. IF THERE IS A MIX OF PENALTY APPLICATIONS, THE MOST RESTRICTIVE APPLIES TO THE ENTIRE JOURNEY. NO CHARGE FOR INFANT WITHOUT SEAT. FORM OF REFUND - ORIGINAL FORM OF PAYMENT. ONLY VALIDATING CARRIER MAY REFUND TICKET. REPRICE FLOWN PORTION USING FARES IN EFFECT ON TICKET ISSUANCE DATE. FOR FULLY FLOWN FARE COMPONENTS FARE BREAK POINTS MAY NOT BE CHANGED. FOR PARTIALLY FLOWN FARE COMPONENTS ONLY DESTINATION FARE BREAK POINTS MAY BE CHANGED. REPRICE USING NORMAL/SPECIAL ONE WAY/ROUND TRIP FARES/ANY RULE/FARE CLASS/EQUAL OR HIGHER RBD. PUBLIC FARES ARE USED IF TICKETED FARE IS IN PUBLIC TARIFF. QUALIFIED PRIVATE FARES OR PUBLIC FARES ARE USED IF TICKETED FARE IS IN PRIVATE TARIFF. NEW FARE FOR FULLY FLOWN FARE COMPONENTS MUST BE EQUAL TO OR HIGHER THAN TICKETED FARE.
